title: Soul Cage
description: Soul cages for capturing and releasing mobs
body:
# Soul Cages 
add two items one reusable and one single use
use them to capture mobs and release them wherever you please,
this also works with villagers and keeps their trades


# Items
Soul Cage Reusable:
Will allow the player to use the item without it breaking
- Crafting recipe

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Reusable Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d653049ce146d4ec8651ccb36c639e9d1ada08ef.png)

</details>




Soul Cage Single Use:
Will allow the player to capture and release a mob once before breaking
- Crafting recipe

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![SingleUse](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f633de4f7852b424d6a0b064b1613629f1a821a2.png)

</details>
